race.comment: Gee, the form of a couple of these was franked after Wednesday's Sandown meeting. MILOS FILOS (7) was beaten only a length when fourth first-up, then split Gold Coast Belle and Dirty Look when second last time out. Gold Coast Belle was only narrowly beaten at Sandown and Dirty Look won the $100k maiden. Peak fitness now and extra trip here no issue. HEAD CAPITALIST (5) needs to lift on what we saw from her in the debut campaign but a couple of recent slick jumpouts suggest she has. CHLOE FIRST (3) worked home well first-up and while drawn poorly, is suited at this trip. UPSTAGE (10) returns from a lay-off. Ran fourth in latest jump-out at Cranbourne. Opened last campaign with a third at Bendigo over 1100m. In the mix.
